title: THE 2PM CLUB Northampton — 80s 90s 00s Daytime Disco
subtitle: Your best night out, right in the middle of the afternoon. 4 hours of 80s, 90s & 00s anthems. Home by 7-ish. Let your hair down. Properly!
description: THE 2PM CLUB Northampton — 4 hours of iconic 80s, 90s & 00s anthems at Franklin's Gardens. All the fun of a proper night out!
fullDescription:
LET YOUR HAIR DOWN. WITHOUT THE NEXT-DAY REGRETS ✨

Remember when going OUT OUT didn't require a week's recovery? When you could sing every word, lose your voice, and still feel human the next day?

We've found the way to make that happen once more!

After our sellout visit in October, we're back at the home of Northampton Saints for an afternoon of iconic 80s 90s and 00s anthems!

4 hours of the biggest hairbrush hits and sing-alongs, with night out energy, confetti moments, and a room full of people who know every word too.
highlights: 🎤 ICONIC ANTHEMS. NONSTOP ENERGY: Wall-to-wall classics from Wham! to Whitney, Bon Jovi to Beyoncé. You WILL do the moves. You WILL lose your voice. You WILL text each other about it for weeks.|🕺 DAYTIME PARTY, NIGHT-OUT VIBES: Same Boombastic team. Club-level production, massive screens, dazzling lights, and confetti explosions - just at people-friendly hours. Dance freely, laugh loudly, and still be home by 7pm.|👯 FINALLY, A PLAN NOBODY BAILS ON: This is the plan that will escape the group chat. Four hours where everyone actually makes it - no babysitter dramas, no late-night worries. Adulting can wait.|😎 ALL THE FUN. STILL BUZZING BY WEDNESDAY: Last time, you walked out saying "Let's do it again!" This is the time to do it. This is your plan.|🏆 TRUST THE LEGACY: Created by Boombastic Events - 10+ years of consistent sell-outs across the Midlands, including previous smash-hit events right here at Franklin's Gardens.
